sections.section_title: Employee, contractor, intern, freelancer, or consultant classification review
sections.text: DEMO LAW PACK: Simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use. Worker classification can depend on contract terms, control, working hours, location, supervision, invoices, payslips, and actual working arrangement. Do not assume employee or contractor status from one label alone.

DEMO LAW PACK: Simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use. Salary or wage non-payment triage needs worker category, amount due, pay period, due date, payslips, attendance/work proof, bank records, and written reason for withholding.
